body:
The previously flagged tool issues (from 2026-04-14) are **still present and unresolved** in this PR. No new design issues were found in this pass.

**Outstanding issues (2):**
1. `CHANGELOG.md:4` — Compares with `16.4.0` instead of the immediately preceding `17.0.0-beta.2` (confirmed: main branch `17.0.0-beta.2` was the prior release).
2. `metadata.json:3` — `api-version 2025-11-01-preview` is the same as what `17.0.0-beta.2` already shipped (confirmed: main branch `cosmosDBManagementClient.ts` also uses `"2025-11-01-preview"`). The new version must target a strictly newer api-version, or the PR description should explicitly state this is a pure TypeSpec tooling migration with no spec change.

Please address the existing inline comments before this PR can be approved.

<details>
<summary>📊 Structured Report</summary>

```json
{"agent":"mgmt-reviewer","pr":38137,"summary":"issues_found","findings":[{"file":"sdk/cosmosdb/arm-cosmosdb/CHANGELOG.md","line":4,"issueType":"tool","category":"changelog-comparison-base","description":"Compared with 16.4.0 instead of the prior beta 17.0.0-beta.2 (existing unresolved comment from 2026-04-14)"},{"file":"sdk/cosmosdb/arm-cosmosdb/metadata.json","line":3,"issueType":"tool","category":"api-version-not-newer","description":"api-version 2025-11-01-preview same as already in 17.0.0-beta.2 on main (existing unresolved comment from 2026-04-14)"}]}
```

</details>

## Next Steps to Merge
Only failed checks and required actions are listed below.

- ❌ **CHANGELOG.md** — Compares with `16.4.0` instead of prior beta `17.0.0-beta.2`. Action: Update CHANGELOG to say `Compared with version 17.0.0-beta.2` and report the tooling bug in [autorest.typescript issues](https://github.com/Azure/autorest.typescript/issues). See existing [inline comment](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-js/pull/38137#discussion_r3078764056).
- ❌ **metadata.json** — `api-version 2025-11-01-preview` is the same as in the already-published `17.0.0-beta.2`. The new SDK version must target a strictly newer api-version, or the PR description must clarify this is a pure TypeSpec tooling migration with no spec change. See existing [inline comment](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-js/pull/38137#discussion_r3078764062).

> All CI checks have passed (checkenforcer ✅). Once the above tool issues are addressed and required reviewers approve, this PR will be ready to merge.
